guardrails.title: No Node-Only APIs
guardrails.body: Do not use Node.js-specific APIs (fs, child_process, net, etc.). Only use APIs available in the edge runtime.

guardrails.title: Minimize Cold Start Impact
guardrails.body: Account for cold start impact. Heavy initialization (bulk module loading, external connections, etc.) shall have mitigation stated in the spec.

guardrails.title: Verify Against Official Docs
guardrails.body: Edge runtime APIs change frequently and AI knowledge may be outdated. Verify current API behavior against official documentation during implementation.
